notes: BOOT button is now a menu toggle in addition to power-off. A brief tap (50-800 ms) in IDLE opens the settings menu, the same tap in MENU or any sub-page goes back, and a tap on the power-off confirm screen cancels it. The original long press (2.5 s+) still opens the power-off confirm. Riding stays untouched — short-press is ignored during the ride HUD so the menu can't pop over the cornering view by accident. Combined with the v2.1.9 bidirectional swipe, there are now two reliable ways to navigate the menu.
